case_title: KENNETH STOVALL VS. THAVIBU RANATLINA ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STOVALL, KENNETH AS TO DEFENDANT RANATLINA, THAVIBU DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-02-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-01-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-11-2016
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT TO COMPLAINT;(TRANSACTION ID # 59650315) FILED BY DEFENDANT RANATUNGA, THAVIDU ERRONEOUSLY SUED HEREIN AS THAVIBU RANATLINA
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 59650315) FILED BY DEFENDANT RANATUNGA, THAVIDU ERRONEOUSLY SUED HEREIN AS THAVIBU RANATLINA JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
JURY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 59650315) DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT RANATUNGA, THAVIDU ERRONEOUSLY SUED HEREIN AS THAVIBU RANATLINA
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100004413) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STOVALL, KENNETH JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JAN-09-2017. THE NOV-02-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE JAN-26-2017.
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR DONALD JOHN ROBERTS.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR ROBERT FREDERICK KANE.
ARBITRATOR PHILIP ALLAN SEGAL APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION MAR-14-2017 THROUGH JUN-12-2017.
ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION EXTENDED TO JUL-05-2017. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STOVALL, KENNETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RANATUNGA, THAVIDU ERRONEOUSLY SUED HEREIN AS THAVIBU RANATLINA $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,500.00, EACH SIDE IS TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS OF SUIT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 100030598) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STOVALL, KENNETH AS TO DEFENDANT RANATUNGA, THAVIDU ERRONEOUSLY SUED HEREIN AS THAVIBU RANATLINA
